svg.title: Alzheimer's disease FDG-PET classification workflow
svg.desc: End-to-end workflow diagram showing dataset input, preprocessing, ResNet50+CBAM model, XAI analysis, and 4-class output (CN, EMCI, MCI, AD)
svg.text: Brain region activation mapping (AAL atlas · MNI space)

Grad-CAM vs SHAP on PET metabolic maps
